title: The dual face of safranal: Neuroprotective antioxidant or mitochondrial uncoupler?
snippet: Mitochondrial dysfunction and redox imbalance lie at the core of neurodegenerative and inflammatory pathologies. Safranal, a monoterpene aldehyde from Crocus sativus L., exhibits paradoxical biological behavior-serving as a neuroprotective antioxidant at physiological doses and a mitochondrial disruptor under excessive exposure. This review integrates mecha...
